channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Cisco Execs Bullish on AI Growth Amid Strong Earnings
item.description: Cisco executives express optimism about the growth in artificial intelligence orders, with $700 million in sales so far this year and a projected $1 billion in 2025. The company reports strong earnings in the second quarter, driven by demand for networking products, including switching, enterprise routing, and industrial IoT applications.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
